/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_linear_regression.dir/examples/test_linear_regression.cpp.o -o test_linear_regression   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 libcudaml.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
